control_awareness: The amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) requires department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) prevents self-approval. Pre-PO approval (P2P-C-003) applies and will be triggered after this request creation. The system enforces these controls automatically.
expected_control_effect: The request will be routed for department head approval before PO issuance, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given the absence of quarter-end pressure and the straightforward nature of the purchase need, a single consolidated purchase request is operationally reasonable and aligns with the requester's objectives and constraints while complying with all enforced controls.
reason: The purchase need requires a service package costing 1,750,000 which exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold for department head approval. Creating a single purchase request with route_type normal follows the standard purchase-to-pay process, respects the amount-based approval control, and aligns with the preference for a clear, consolidated request as there is no operational need to split the request.
